description_long: This object is a leafy potted plant with elongated, broad green leaves that have lighter green and yellowish variegation. The leaves are arranged in a somewhat radial pattern around several thin, woody stems that converge at the base. The stems are slender and light brown, supporting the foliage above. The plant appears healthy, with leaves that are slightly glossy and have a natural, organic curvature. There is no visible pot or container in the images, suggesting the focus is solely on the plant itself. The overall size and structure indicate it is suitable for placement in urban environments such as patios, sidewalks, or indoor communal spaces.
description: A leafy potted plant with broad, variegated green leaves and slender woody stems, suitable for urban placement. The plant has a healthy, natural appearance with a radial leaf arrangement.
description_view_0: This view shows the plant from the front, highlighting the dense cluster of broad, green leaves and the central convergence of stems.
description_view_1: This angle reveals more of the plant's horizontal spread, with leaves extending outward and some overlapping, giving a fuller appearance.
description_view_2: From this side, the lighter undersides of the leaves and the branching structure of the stems are more visible.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the upper leaves and the plant's overall height, with the stems and leaf arrangement clearly displayed.
attribute_plant_species: Desert Rose (Adenium obesum) or similar broad-leafed succulent
